history.text: First pre-imperial dynasty ruled or strongly influenced the territory before the modern state.
First imperial dynasty ruled or strongly influenced the territory before the modern state.
the Republic of China was established, giving China a new political framework.
Proclamation of the People's Republic introduced a new form of state rule.
The current constitution came into force, setting the basic framework for today's China.
